name: Credit Repair Specialists
description_short: Super Lawyers is a legal directory and referral platform connecting consumers with credit repair and bankruptcy attorneys in Flushing, NY and surrounding areas.
description_long:
Super Lawyers operates as a vetted attorney directory and matching service rather than a direct credit repair company. The platform curates listings of "Super Lawyers" selectees—attorneys who have been selected through peer nomination and evaluation processes. For credit repair services in Flushing, NY, Super Lawyers displays profiles of multiple licensed attorneys including specialists like Larry Smith at Smith Marco, P.C., David Y. Wolnerman at White & Wolnerman, PLLC, and others who handle credit report disputes and restoration.

The platform offers consumers a searchable database of credit repair attorneys organized by location and legal specialty. Users can view attorney profiles, contact information, service areas, and brief descriptions of experience. The directory includes both established Super Lawyers selectees and Rising Stars (newer attorneys gaining recognition). The website provides free legal resources including articles and an "Ask a Lawyer" feature where consumers can get answers to credit-related legal questions.

What distinguishes Super Lawyers is its vetting and selection process. Attorneys listed are not simply paid advertisers—they are nominated by peers and evaluated based on professional achievement and client satisfaction. The platform emphasizes experience and credentials rather than marketing claims. The directory covers multiple practice areas beyond credit repair, including personal injury, business litigation, and bankruptcy.

The primary limitation is that Super Lawyers itself is a referral directory, not a credit repair service provider. Consumers must contact individual attorneys through the platform to receive actual credit repair services. The website does not handle disputes, credit restoration, or other services directly—it facilitates connections between consumers and licensed attorneys who do. Success depends entirely on the quality and responsiveness of individual attorney firms listed.
pros: Curated network of peer-nominated attorneys rather than pay-to-play listings
Free legal resources and Ask a Lawyer feature for credit questions
Multiple attorney profiles with specific contact information and service areas
Rising Stars section identifies emerging attorneys alongside established Super Lawyers selectees
National reach with attorneys serving Flushing and surrounding regions
Transparent representation of attorney experience and credentials
cons: Super Lawyers is a directory, not a service provider—no direct credit repair services offered
Consumers must contact individual attorneys; no unified intake or case management system
No accountability mechanism if referred attorney underperforms
Limited information about specific fees, timelines, or success rates for credit disputes
Directory primarily promotes attorneys; consumer reviews or feedback not visible on site
best_for: Consumers seeking lawyer referrals specifically vetted through peer nomination
New York residents needing credit repair or credit-related legal representation
Those preferring licensed attorneys over non-attorney credit repair companies
diagnosis: Super Lawyers is a legal referral directory, not a credit repair company itself. It is best for consumers who specifically want to work with licensed attorneys for credit disputes, identity theft, or credit report errors and who value peer-vetted credentials. The caveat is that using this platform requires identifying and contacting an individual attorney—it provides matching and directory services but does not deliver credit repair services directly.
services: Attorney directory search by location and legal specialty
Credit repair attorney profiles and contact information
Free Ask a Lawyer service for credit-related questions
Legal articles and educational resources on credit issues
Attorney peer nomination and selection process
Rising Stars designation for emerging attorneys
Multi-area legal practice directory beyond credit repair
Attorney profile management and account login for selectees
